stemHtml: The pilot of an aircraft during a VFR flight in a controlled airspace confirms that the aircraft is exactly on the desired track and the ATC instructs him/her to turn left for 030° to avoid conflicting traffic. Two minutes later, the ATC advises: "You are now two miles left off your intended track. Turn right to regain track in 30 miles." What is the heading correction that must done to comply with the ATC instructions?
